titleStmt.title: Yiyang [=Xingyang] Zheng Wengong inscription (rubbing) (rubbing)
滎陽鄭文公碑 (拓本)（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Indianapolis Museum of Art at Newfields

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Yiyang [=Xingyang] Zheng Wengong inscription (rubbing). Indianapolis Museum of Art at Newfields, Gift of George F. Staudter. VERIFIED record page resolves (HTTP 200); page data explicitly names Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 and 'Yiyang Zheng Wengong inscription'. HONEST LIMITATION: the embedded record JSON shows iiif_manifest:null and images:[] — NO online image and NO IIIF manifest available, so reported as record-only. ('Yiyang' is Newfields' romanization slip for 滎陽 Xingyang.)

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Rubbing of the Zheng Wengong stele text (Northern Wei, original 511 CE), calligraphy by Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (450-516).

bibl.ref: Indianapolis Museum of Art at Newfields — collection record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from the Indianapolis Museum of Art (Newfields) via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. Provenance-only (no public IIIF image).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked collection record.
